NCH is now part of Solenis

    Did You Know?

    NCH has merged with Solenis, creating a more diversified business with increased scale, broader global reach, and superior customer service capabilities.

Contact an expert
Home Careers

Careers

Careers with Solenis, a leading global provider of innovative solutions that drive sustainability forward for water-intensive industries.

Solenis Career Opportunities

Search Careers

Grow your career with Solenis.

Whether you’re a student looking for a rewarding internship or a professional focused on making a real-world impact, Solenis is the team where your voice, passion and drive make a difference for our customers and the environment. Learn more about joining a global leader in innovative sustainability solutions for water-intensive industries.

Solenis is a 2025 Best Managed Company Gold Standard Winner

The Best Managed Companies program is a mark of excellence for private organizations.  This award focuses on achievements in strategic planning and execution, a commitment to our people and fostering a dynamic, resilient culture, as well as delivering strong financials. 

Learn more

Diversey India Honored as One of the "100 Best Companies for Women in India 2023" for the Second Consecutive Year

At Diversey - A Solenis Company, our commitment to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DE&I) is not just a philosophy but a fundamental part of our organizational DNA. Diversey India has once again been recognized as one of the "100 Best Companies for Women in India 2023" by AVTAR & SERAMOUNT Group. This prestigious acknowledgment reflects our sustained dedication to cultivating a workplace that champions gender inclusivity. 

Learn more

Diversey Earns Top Employer Recognition for Third Consecutive Year

Diversey, a Solenis company is proud to be recognized as a Top Employer in Egypt, Turkey, UAE, and South Africa for 2025. This marks our third consecutive year receiving this prestigious award, reaffirming our commitment to fostering a people-first culture. The Top Employers certification is the leading global benchmark for excellence in people practices, helping organizations enhance their competitive advantage by aligning with the Top Employers Institute’s rigorous standards.

Why Choose Solenis

Explore how Solenis helps you grow a career and shape the future of sustainability.

Discover Solenis
Students & Graduates

Discover opportunities for students and graduates.

Explore opportunity

Working at Solenis

"We're eager to invest in team players who are passionate, analytical, smart and experienced, because our brand will only be as strong as the team it represents."
John E. Panichella
Chief Executive Officer

We're here to help.

Whether you want to build a career that lets you make a real difference or need expert advice on your water treatment and process improvement challenges, we’re ready to deliver.

Expert Support

If you have a technical question or need insights from a specialist, we can help.

Contact an expert
Career Paths

Use your expertise and ingenuity to help solve our customers’ sustainability challenges.

Join our team

Related Content

Our History

The Solenis legacy of helping customers solve process and water treatment problems stretches back more than 100 years. Learn more about our rich history.
